input.rawContent:
From: room2@maplegrove-childcare.ca
Subject: This week in the Infant Room

Hi families! Reminder that Friday is a PD day so the centre is closed. Please send an extra set of clothes and a labelled water bottle next week. We had a lovely week of tummy time and music. — Ms. Priya
